summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.tools; import java.io.File; import java.sql.Connection; import java.sql.DriverManager; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.TaskContext; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.model.orchestration.Database; public class DatabaseTool implements ITool { @Override public String getName() { return "DatabaseTool"; } @Override public String execute(String command, File workingDir, TaskContext context) throws Exception { Database dbSettings = context.getOrchestrator().getDatabase(); if (dbSettings == null) { throw new Exception("Database settings not configured in the orchestrator."); } if ("TEST_CONNECTION".equalsIgnoreCase(command)) { String url = dbSettings.getUrl(); String user = dbSettings.getUsername();
